title: WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH - 211info
text: AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG WOMEN REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Reproductive Health (RH) Program oversees a statewide network of certified health care providers to ensure access to a suite of reproductive health services (including preventive reproductive health care, preconception and contraception). Services include annual gynecological exams (including pap tests, breast exams and STI screening); pregnancy testing; birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception, abortion referrals, obstetrics and gynecology services. 150 Kenneth Ford Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Individuals with a household income below 250% FPL Services are provided to all individuals regardless of ability to pay, race, color, national origin, immigration status, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, or disability. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6pm Email (541) 672-9596 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 672-9596 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None for individuals with a household income under 250% federal poverty level (FPL). Sliding scale fees available for individuals with a household income above 250% FPL. Insurance will be billed, if applicable. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off NE Stephens Street, across the street from Costco Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PHARMACY OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINATION CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AVIVA HEALTH ROSEBURG
